title: Pseudomonas detection in clinical samples with probes, V1, ECLIPSE WP5 Task 2
author: VARANI, STEFANIA
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The dataset is related to the clinical study. Data on Pseudomonas-positive and Pseudomonas-negative clinical samples were obtained from the diagnostic routine at IRCCS-AOUBO. Data obtained from an in house quantitative real-time PCR (reference test) were added and compared with results obtained by employing the newly developed platform based on oligo-DNA  probes.     The data were generated in the framework of the Horizon Europe project ECLIPSE.
steps_raw: The dataset is related to the clinical study. Data on Pseudomonas-positive and Pseudomonas-negative clinical samples were obtained from the diagnostic routine at IRCCS-AOUBO.
